Application For Preliminary Injunction Per Ex Parte Order
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joseph Breall, Esq., 415-345-0545 for plaintiff and moving party Louis Rovens
Richard Johns, Esq. of Kipperman & Johns, 415-781-8494 for defendant and opposing party Salazar Designs Incorp. & Roberto Salazar

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
APPLICATION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION PER EX PARTE ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HASN'T SHOWN LIKLIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON INVASION OF PRIVACY CLAIM, AND BALANCING OF HARMS DOES NOT WEIGH IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #: 8620 (301/PHA/PM)
